title: Knowledge Representation Using Rules: A Flowchart
description: A flowchart illustrating how a knowledge base of rules is used by an inference engine to derive new facts or conclusions.
relationships: Inference Engine matches rules in Knowledge Base against facts in Working Memory
Matching rules are added to the Agenda
Inference Engine selects and fires a rule from the Agenda
Executing a rule's action adds new facts to Working Memory or produces a final Conclusion
